title: RAG-Level Opt-Out Compliance Failure: Empirical Evidence from Four Major AI Vendors
description: Empirical dataset demonstrating that all four major AI vendors (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI) fail to respect noai meta tags and W3C TDM Reservation Protocol signals at the RAG/inference level, despite correct crawler-level compliance. Includes crawl logs, honeypot data, canary token baselines, and session compliance tracking from a controlled experiment on tlimresearch.org (2026-06-11 through 2026-06-15).
notes: Data collected from tlimresearch.org, a controlled research site instrumented with opt-out signals and crawl tracking infrastructure. All IP addresses are SHA-256 hashed; no PII is present.
